confusing.rationale: The public mirror body says Closed while the Frantic source of truth says open.

duplicated.rationale: No exact duplicate title exists in the unique live inventory.

overcrowded.rationale: The board has two open rows; #49 exposes capacity in one row rather than duplicating entries.

stale.rationale: No currently open bounty is older than seven days.

evidence.title: Publish Sourcey docs for a second ecosystem

superseded.rationale: The current open rows have distinct deliverables; no sampled open bounty supersedes another.

findings.impact: A worker following the public mirror can incorrectly skip an available funded bounty.
findings.next_operator_action: Update mirror #97 to Status: Open and keep future mirror status synchronized from the Frantic projection.
findings.observed: Frantic reports open; the GitHub mirror body says Closed.

observations: The governed audit discovered and called frantic.read_board.
Counts from the captured public response: open=2, delivered=2, accepted=16, paid=31, total=55.
Six exact bounty pages were opened through frantic.get_bounty: 46, 49, 43, 42, 36, 11.
Stale, superseded, duplicate, confusing, and overcrowded categories were checked independently.
The concrete #46 mirror mismatch is bound to both the live bounty URL and GitHub mirror URL.
Every sampled bounty has a keep, close, or rewrite-oriented operator action bound to its exact number.
No private credentials or authenticated Frantic action tools were used.

recommendations.next_operator_action: Rewrite GitHub mirror issue #97 so its status matches the live open board state.
recommendations.rationale: Live, funded, and has one available slot.

recommendations.next_operator_action: Keep one row and continue exposing capacity rather than duplicating inventory.
recommendations.rationale: One intentional multi-claim goodwill row does not overcrowd the board.

recommendations.next_operator_action: Complete review; reopen only if the submitted evidence is rejected.
recommendations.rationale: Delivered work is in the review lifecycle and should remain visible until judgment.

recommendations.next_operator_action: Settle payout, then retain only in completed inventory.
recommendations.rationale: Accepted work should remain visible until payout settles.

recommendations.next_operator_action: Keep archived as paid evidence; do not return it to open inventory.
recommendations.rationale: Paid work is complete and belongs only in completed inventory.

recommendations.next_operator_action: Complete review and publish the resulting judgment.
recommendations.rationale: Delivered work is awaiting review and is not stale open inventory.
